# ENV SETUP KNOWLEDGE BASE

## OVERVIEW
Environment setup guide for students (Git, R, RStudio) with step-by-step screenshots.

## STRUCTURE
```
env/
├── env_init.md     # Setup guide (Chinese)
└── assets/         # Screenshots referenced by env_init.md
```

## WHERE TO LOOK
| Task | Location | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| Setup instructions | env/env_init.md | Includes Git, SSH, R, RStudio, repo fork steps |
| Screenshot assets | env/assets/ | Referenced with relative paths in env_init.md |

## CONVENTIONS
- Keep image filenames stable; env_init.md links to them directly.
- The guide assumes Windows examples and Git Bash usage.

## ANTI-PATTERNS
- Do not move or rename images in env/assets/ without updating env_init.md.
